notes: TCGplayer Authentication Center study (1,500+ packs opened). Per-pack odds: double rare 1/8 and ultra rare 1/16 in the rare slot; illustration rare 1/12, special illustration rare 1/32 and hyper rare 1/51 replacing the second reverse-holo slot. Corroborated by an independent 700-pack DigitalTQ sample (DR 13.3%, IR 7.7%, UR 6.0%, SIR 3.6%). Reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. Special set: no booster box display in the West (booster bundles, ETB and collection boxes only).
